scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check auth.js && node --check discord.js && node --check netlify/functions/api.js && node --check scripts/build-single-html.js && node --check scripts/build-netlify.js
scripts.open:site: node -e "const { exec } = require('child_process'); const url=process.env.PUBLIC_SITE_URL || process.env.APP_URL || 'https://syncora.netlify.app'; exec((process.platform==='win32'?'start ':process.platform==='darwin'?'open ':'xdg-open ') + url); console.log('Opening ' + url);"
